column1: # This CSV-file format contains values separated with a '
# CR_rPARAMS[2]  = Feedrate in Meters/Second. This is the robot speed.
# CR_rPARAMS[12] = Custom End Effect Tool On/Off.
# CR_rPARAMS[13] = Total Number of Motion Lines in file.
# Columns 8 until 34 can contain additional process values
# This process-data is optional and may be omitted.
# This CSV-file format may contain comments if they start with the '#' sign.
# This CSV-file format may contain empty lines.
